summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NEW features added after iteration 14: Admin Expenses tracker, Video Testimonials page, and Course Outline Editor. All 16 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/expenses returns expenses list
Backend: GET /api/admin/expenses/stats returns stats with monthly data, categories, current_month
Backend: POST /api/admin/expenses creates expense and persists to database
Backend: PUT /api/admin/expenses/{id} updates expense
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/expenses/{id} deletes expense and verifies removal
Backend: GET /api/admin/expenses without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/video-testimonials returns only approved videos (public)
Backend: GET /api/admin/video-testimonials returns all videos (all statuses)
Backend: POST /api/admin/video-testimonials creates video (auto-approved)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/video-testimonials/{id} updates status
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/video-testimonials/{id} deletes video
Backend: GET /api/admin/video-testimonials without auth returns 401
Backend: PUT /api/admin/courses/{id}/outline updates course outline with weeks/lessons/assignments
Backend: PUT /api/admin/courses/nonexistent/outline returns 404
Backend: PUT /api/admin/courses/{id}/outline without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/courses returns courses list
Frontend: Admin Courses page loads with 9 course cards
Frontend: Course cards have Edit, Outline, Delete buttons
Frontend: Course Outline Editor modal opens with Add Week, Add Lesson, Add Assignment, Save Outline buttons
Frontend: Add Week functionality works - adds new week to outline
Frontend: Admin Expenses page loads with stats cards (This Month Expenses, Revenue, Expenses, Profit/Loss)
Frontend: Admin Expenses page has Revenue vs Expenses chart (Last 6 Months)
Frontend: Admin Expenses page has Category Breakdown section
Frontend: Admin Expenses page has Month/Year filter
Frontend: Add Expense modal works with Category, Amount, Description, Month, Year fields
Frontend: Expense list shows items with edit and delete buttons
Frontend: Admin Video Testimonials page loads with search, filter tabs (All, pending, approved, rejected)
Frontend: Add Video Testimonial modal works with Student Name, Course Name, YouTube/Link toggle, Video URL, Description
Frontend: Video cards show View and Delete buttons
Frontend: Public /video-testimonials page loads correctly with NO double header/footer
Frontend: Public Video Testimonials has hero section, video grid, CTA section, footer
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up automatically by pytest fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 tested the NEW features added after iteration 14: 1) Admin Expenses tracker with full CRUD, stats, charts, category breakdown, and month/year filtering. 2) Video Testimonials with admin management (add/approve/reject/delete) and public display page. 3) Course Outline Editor modal for managing weeks, lessons, and assignments. All APIs and UI components working correctly. Admin sidebar now has 10 navigation items including Videos and Expenses. Email notifications remain MOCKED (logs to console).

mocked_apis_list: Resend email notifications (logs to console instead of sending real emails)

ui_features: Stats cards (This Month Expenses, Revenue, Expenses, Profit/Loss)
Add Expense modal with form validation
